findings.evidence: `rg` hits: existing `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:401:lemma subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq` has the same LHS and RHS `QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) φ⁻¹ = QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) ψ⁻¹`; existing `Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:271:lemma normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_mk` and `:280:lemma normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_symm_mk` identify those quotient classes with the normalizer-quotient representatives used here.
findings.fix: Remove these wrappers or replace them with a single compatibility lemma explicitly rewriting the existing quotient-group criterion through `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal`; derive base cases locally from that existing criterion when needed.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq`, its regular wrapper at line 290, and the base specializations at lines 304 and 325 add a parallel normalizer-quotient API for an equality criterion already available for arbitrary subgroups.

summary: The added criteria are normal-subgroup restatements of the existing arbitrary-subgroup fibre-orbit equality API after the established normalizer-quotient/quotient-group comparison, with the base criteria as the ψ = 1 specialization.
